name: Admin
description: Office, facilities, IT, insurance, utilities and day-to-day administration.

items.title: Office & warehouse rent
items.description: Pay rent, share TDS computation with landlord.

items.title: Utility bills (electricity, water, internet)
items.description: Collect, book and pay utility bills.

items.title: Insurance renewals (fire, stock, liability)
items.description: Review and renew general insurance policies before expiry.

items.title: Group mediclaim renewal
items.description: Renew employee group mediclaim; update list of covered employees and dependants.

items.title: E-way bill compliance check
items.description: Review outbound and inbound e-way bills — cancellations, expiries, mismatches.

items.title: Fire drill / safety walk
items.description: Conduct fire drill, inspect extinguishers and emergency exits.

items.title: Company vehicle — PUC / insurance / FC
items.description: Track Pollution Certificate, insurance and fitness renewals.

items.title: AMC review (AC, lifts, pest control, CCTV)
items.description: Verify service frequency under AMCs, raise POs for renewals.

items.title: Fixed asset physical verification
items.description: Physical verification of high-value assets against the fixed asset register.

items.title: Data backup integrity check
items.description: Verify Tally, Tranzact and shared-drive backups are running and restorable.

items.title: Courier charges reconciliation
items.description: Match Shiprocket / DTDC / Bluedart invoices with dispatch register and book expense.
